ModBotRelease.Changelog: - Fixed weapon skins not appearing in customization editor

GitHubRelease.Changelog:
I've decided to switch to working on 4.3 as the patch for 4.2 became much bigger that originally planned plus to not delay 4.3 anymore. 
NOTE: Starting with the next build, due to internal changes, customization assets updates will only come to version 4.3, leaving 4.2 outdated for a while. Weapon skins sent to verification in 4.2, will be available only in 4.3

# Player customization system changes
- Added new type of items: Accessories
img=images/AccessoriesPoster-Wide-Combined-Compressed.png
- Reworked customization items list. All items now have previews
img=images/42_patch11_2.png
- Added arrow spawn point object to customization editor
- Added particles when switching weapon skins
- Made weapon skins respawn on clones and enemies with slight delay to reduce freeze duration when customizing the player. More work will be done on this in future
- Redone weapon skins refreshing logic, fixing vanilla skins visible for a brief moment when equipping weapon
- A lot of internal changes made to customization system

# Visual and gameplay changes
- Added back weapons on the back
img=images/42_patch11_4.png
- Reworked welding particles
- Improved double jump effects
- Made the camera tilt rely on player rotation instead of cursor movement
- Made the camera tilt less in first person mode when holding bow
- Improved camera positioning in first person mode when holding spear
- Made business bots ties no longer visible in first person mode
- Added back reverting upgrades
- Added back great swords modifier to story mode
- Added triple jump upgrade
- Double jumping is now impossible without a leg
- Increased scythe speed and damaging area

# UI changes
- Added new options to title screen customization
img=images/42_patch11_3.png
- Slightly updated the overhauled title screen UI
- Added sounds when clicking buttons, like in hyperdome. All menus will eventually have sounds
- Made crash screen more informative
- Added "Team Battle" tab to overhauled workshop browser
- Added restart adventure button to reworked pause menu
- Improved hyperdome-like transitions

# Settings changes
- Reorganized and renamed many settings, removed the home page
- Added "Model update delay" setting to reduce the inconsistency between just separated voxel models
- Added cooldown slider for "Scroll to switch weapon" setting
- Added more FPS options and increased the FPS limit
- Increased the camera FOV limit

# Misc. changes
- Music will now fade out when exiting to main menu or going to next match
- Added tint color and rotation settings to realistic skyboxes
- Improved light settings handling in advanced photo mode
- Added physics interpolation to armor
- The physics of garbage now interpolate only for a second after appearing
- Added caching of downloaded images
- Made Overhaul mod logo disappear if the game crashes on start
- Improved handling of code exceptions
- Various internal changes and optimizations
- Reduced the size of the mod

# Realistic skyboxes addon changes
Note: You'll have to update the addon to version 5 or higher to get following changes:
- Added new lighting to team battle levels
img=images/42_patch11_1.png
- Reworked lighting for few endless mode levels

# Fixes
- Crashes caused by new game update
- First person mode not working after mind trasnfer in story mode
- Weapon skins disappearing after death
- Realistic skyboxes applying to Last bot standing and Team battle waiting rooms
- Realistic skyboxes not working for some players
- Being able to see through walls with high FOV
- Physics interpolation not applying to main part of robot's body
- Transition sound not playing if new transition started right after the previous one
- Some lists in UIs not getting scrolled to the top automatically
- Missing translation in few UIs
- Fixed Epic Games platform displaying as "N/A"
- Some math behind first person mode
- Customization items templates not working
- Loading indicators animation not playing when the game is paused
- Player animation gets reset on upgrade when holding scythe
- Player becomes T-posed when starting editing a customization item or changing weapon type when animations are disabled in customization editor
- Hiding HUD doesn't hide difficulty tier announcement in photo mode
- Customization assets window offering to install assets again after first install
- Post effects not working after playtesting a weapon skin in customization editor
